office_does: The county auditor administers elections, records documents, licenses vehicles, and oversees county financial functions.
race_blurb: Four candidates seek the office; the dossiers provide substantial record evidence for the incumbent but only filing-level information for three challengers.

candidates.summary: Democratic candidate whose reviewed dossier verifies her filing but provides no stable detailed platform.
Incumbent auditor with a long finance, budgeting, accounting, and reporting background.
highlights: Reports 37 years in finance and related fields [S2]
Emphasizes election audits, internal controls, deed-fraud prevention, and election security [S2][S3]

experience.basis: Incumbency and 37 years of finance, budgeting, accounting, and reporting experience establish a strongly record-based profile.

candidates.summary: Republican candidate whose reviewed dossier verifies her filing but provides no stable detailed platform.
No-party-preference candidate whose reviewed dossier verifies her filing but provides no stable detailed platform.
